assertions.assertion: Calls ConfigureDPoPTokensForScheme on IServiceCollection (builder.Services), NOT inside the AddJwtBearer options lambda
assertions.rationale: builder.Services.ConfigureDPoPTokensForScheme('token') is called on IServiceCollection, outside AddJwtBearer.

assertions.assertion: Registers a distributed cache implementation (e.g., AddDistributedMemoryCache or Redis) for DPoP replay detection
Sets ValidTypes to include 'at+jwt' on the JWT bearer handler
assertions.rationale: ValidTypes = ["at+jwt"] is set in the AddJwtBearer options.
Package is mentioned with dotnet add command.
